revision.text:
{{Mbox | type = content | image = [[File:Sandbox Not.svg|50px|alt=|link=]] | text = '''This page is ''not'' a [[Wikipedia:About the sandbox|sandbox]].'''
It should not be used for test editing. To experiment, please use the [[Wikipedia:Sandbox|Wikipedia sandbox]], your [[Special:MyPage/sandbox|user sandbox]], or the [[Wikipedia:About the sandbox#List of sandboxes|other sandboxes]]. {{{note|}}}
}}{{template other|__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
